name: LND
description: LND is a Lightning Network daemon for Bitcoin. This script installs LND in a Debian 13 LXC with optional RTL web UI, optional Tor support, and optional static channel backup automation.

notes.text: Wallet creation remains manual by design. Run `lncli create` after installation.
RTL is optional and becomes fully usable after the LND wallet and macaroon files exist.
Static channel backup automation is optional and can store backups locally or push them to a Git remote.
